title: Verify Loss Aversion Exit Gate appears when user clicks Cancel
description: Test that when user attempts to cancel, the Loss Aversion intervention screen appears with warning about losing remaining days
preconditions: User has active trial with remaining days
User is on Trial Corner page
expected_result: Pop-up displays with headline 'Wait! Don't lose your free days', body warning about immediate access loss with remaining days count, 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder' as high prominence primary action, and 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access' as low prominence secondary action
